2.0 Violation Details

MEDIUM VIO-001 SBC Ref: 41-3.3.4

Visible flexible cable/cord run without concealed sections in damage-prone areas

Bounding box detected at region
Description Worker handling loose electrical wires suspended from ceiling. Wires are not secured.
SBC Code 41-3.3.4 — Flexible cables and cords in separated circuits shall be visible throughout any part of their length liable to mechanical damage.
Priority MEDIUM
